response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for a junior/mid-level role. Strong technical match on TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-adjacent skills, but severe overqualification creates high flight risk, compensation mismatch, and likely dissatisfaction with entry-level scope. Berlin-based which fits on-site requirement, but seniority gap is the dominant concern.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js and React experience from Optilyz and RIDE Capital
Berlin-based, matching the high on-site presence requirement
Demonstrated fullstack breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
concerns: Massive overqualification — 15+ years of experience for an entry-level role
Only basic German, which may matter for a German renewable-energy/construction client base
No PostgreSQL listed (MongoDB/MySQL instead) and no Nest.js experience
